title: Skeleton — Loading Placeholder Shimmer
problem: Pages that fetch data from Postgres (session list, clip list, waveform) need to show a loading state that communicates structure before content arrives. A blank screen or spinner gives no sense of what's coming.
analysis: Skeleton is a div with animate-pulse and bg-surface. Callers control width, height, and border-radius. Used for: session card skeletons, clip card skeletons, waveform loading shimmer (full-width), member row skeletons, storage indicator skeleton.
successCriteria:
- Renders as a grey animated shimmer div
- animate-pulse (Tailwind) runs on mount
- Accepts width/height/className props for flexible sizing
- Does not shift layout when swapped for real content (caller must match dimensions)
implementation: components/ui/Skeleton.tsx: `className` prop + optional `width`/`height`. Renders `<div className={cn('animate-pulse bg-surface rounded', className)} style={{ width, height }} />`.
knownLimitations: Caller is responsible for matching Skeleton dimensions to actual content — no auto-sizing
userGuide: Grey shimmer placeholders appear while content is loading.
